zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy Foster於1520年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普時，他的父親Thomas Foster30歲，母親Lady Maud Fitzgeffry24歲。他於大約1538年與Joan Church在英國巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1578年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy Foster于1520年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普时，他的父亲Thomas Foster30岁，母亲Lady Maud Fitzgeffry24岁。他于大约1538年与Joan Church在英国巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1578年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Foster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Forster   ‘worker in a forest’.
English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English foster ‘foster parent’ (Old English fōstre, a derivative of fōstrian ‘to nourish or rear’). But other explanations are equally or more likely.
English: from Old French forcetier ‘maker of scissors’; see Forster 2.

variants.name: Fewster
meanings: English (mainly East Yorkshire and Durham): occupational name from Anglo-Norman French and Middle English fu(y)ster ‘maker of saddletrees’. See also Foster .

variants.name: Forster
meanings: English: shortened form of   Forrester  , an occupational name for someone who worked in a forest.
English: possibly a Norman French nickname or occupational name from Old French forcetier ‘maker of scissors or shears, cutler’. Compare Force and Forse .

German (mainly Förster): agent derivative of Middle High German forst ‘forest’, denoting someone who lived in or near a royal forest, or who worked in one (see Forst ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Foerster .

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy Foster was born in 1520, in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Thomas Foster, was 30 and his mother, Lady Maud Fitzgeffry, was 24. He married Joan Church about 1538, in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died about 1578, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy Foster est né en 1520, à Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Foster, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Maud Fitzgeffry, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joan Church environ 1538, à Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé environ 1578, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy Foster 1520 in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Foster 30 und seine Mutter Lady Maud Fitzgeffry 24. Er hat um 1538 in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England Joan Church geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb um 1578 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy Foster è nato il nel 1520 nel Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Foster, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lady Maud Fitzgeffry, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Joan Church circa 1538, nel Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì circa 1578, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 59 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Guy Foster(이)가 1520년 영국 벅잉함실르 핸슬로프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Foster(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Maud Fitzgeffry(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1538년 영국 벅잉함실르 핸슬로프에서 Joan Church(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1578년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy Foster nasceu em 1520, em Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Foster, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Maud Fitzgeffry, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Church aproximadamente 1538, em Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1578, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy Foster родился в 1520 г. в местности ханслоп, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Foster было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Maud Fitzgeffry, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Church около 1538 г. в местности ханслоп, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер около 1578 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy Foster nació en 1520, en Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Foster, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Maud Fitzgeffry, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Joan Church aproximadamente 1538, en Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1578, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 59 años.
